title: Filipino Sweet Corn Fried Rice
description: A simple and flavorful Filipino-inspired fried rice dish loaded with sweet corn and savory spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add diced onion and minced garlic. Cook until onion is translucent.
Add diced chicken and cook until heated through.
Add fish sauce, soy sauce, salt, and pepper. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add sweet corn and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Add fried rice and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Transfer to a serving platter and serve immediately.
